# Effects

Effects tokens cover the visual treatments applied to surfaces and elements — shadows, border radii, and border styles. Using these tokens ensures consistency across components and makes global updates straightforward.

## References

- [Shadows](?path=/story/tokens-effects--shadows) — Box shadows used to create depth and elevation across components like cards, modals, and dropdowns.
- [Border Radius](?path=/story/tokens-effects--radius) — Corner radius values applied to buttons, cards, inputs, and other UI surfaces.
- [Borders](?path=/story/tokens-effects--borders) — Border styles and widths used for outlines, dividers, and component edges.
